questions.scenario: The staging slot starts successfully, but the production slot has a different Key Vault reference for `DATABASE_URL`. What should the team do before swapping?

options.text: Swap immediately because the code already started in staging.
Compare slot-specific settings and confirm the production identity can read the production secret.
Delete the setting from production to make both slots match.
Move the database into the staging slot.

questions.explanation: Slots help test the release, but slot-specific settings can still change behavior. The team should verify the values that will apply after traffic moves.

questions.scenario: Before a production slot swap, the candidate slot has passed smoke tests but the team still needs evidence that traffic can move safely and return if needed. Which checks make a slot swap safer for a backend API?

options.text: The candidate slot starts with the expected runtime and app settings.
Health checks pass against the candidate slot.
The rollback target and previous production slot are known.
The app service plan name is shorter after the swap.

questions.explanation: A safe swap needs runtime, health, and rollback evidence. Naming style is not release safety.
